meanings.usage: 通常搭配介词for，表示对某事物的强烈喜爱
后接名词作宾语，常见搭配plead ignorance（声称不知情）
修饰动词，描述人做某事时愉快的状态
常搭配介词on/upon，指开始一项新的或重要的活动
搭配介词for，表示满足某人或某群体的需求
指在某一领域没有经验的人
常搭配介词for，表示释放某种情绪或能量的渠道
用来形容人善于应对各种困难
常搭配live under the delusion that，表示抱有错误的想法
指把机器、结构等拆成多个部件
常用来描述细线、链条等硬物突然折断

meanings.meaning: 难以克服的，无法解决的
meanings.usage: 常修饰问题、困难等，表示难度极大无法应对

meanings.meaning: 拼图游戏，错综复杂的事物
meanings.usage: jigsaw puzzle指拼图，也可比喻复杂难理清的情况
通常指反复抱怨或催促某人做某事

phrases.usage: 抽出时间做（一直想做的事）

examples.en: I've been meaning to fix the shelf, but I never got round to it.
examples.zh: 我一直想修那个架子，但始终抽不出时间做。

examples.en: They spent three months laying out their new garden.
examples.zh: 他们花了三个月布置新花园。

examples.en: Some fans go so far as to wait outside the hotel for hours just to see the star.
examples.zh: 一些粉丝甚至在酒店外等好几个小时，就为了看明星一眼。

examples.en: This restaurant caters for vegetarians with a special menu.
examples.zh: 这家餐厅有专门的菜单满足素食者的需求。

examples.en: He lives under the delusion that he can win the game without practice.
examples.zh: 他误以为不用练习就能赢得比赛。

phrases.usage: 请来，叫（专业人士）来帮忙

examples.en: We had to call in a plumber to fix the blocked pipe.
examples.zh: 我们不得不请水管工来修堵塞的管道。

examples.en: My mother would not hear of me walking home alone at night.
examples.zh: 我妈妈不同意我晚上独自走路回家。

examples.en: The floor was littered with toy bricks after the kids played.
examples.zh: 孩子们玩过之后，地板上散落着积木。

examples.en: Needless to say, the concert was canceled because of the bad weather.
examples.zh: 不用说，演唱会因为恶劣天气取消了。

grammar.title: so...that...引导的倒装句
grammar.definition: 当so+形容词/副词位于句首表示强调时，句子需要部分倒装，用来加强语气
grammar.structure: So + adj./adv. + be动词/助动词/情态动词 + 主语 + that + 结果状语从句
grammar.usage: 用于强调形容词或副词所描述的程度，引出后面的结果

examples.en: So great is our passion for doing things for ourselves, that we are becoming increasingly less dependent on specialized labour.
examples.zh: 我们自己动手的热情是如此高涨，以至于我们越来越不依赖专业劳动力。

examples.en: So fast did he run that no one could catch up with him.
examples.zh: 他跑得太快了，没人能追上他。

grammar.title: 虚拟语气在suggest后的宾语从句中的用法
grammar.definition: 当suggest表示“建议”时，后面的宾语从句需要用虚拟语气，即谓语动词为should+动词原形，should可以省略
grammar.structure: 主语 + suggest + that + 主语 + (should) + 动词原形 + 其他
grammar.usage: 用于表达建议、要求、命令等含义的动词后的宾语从句中

examples.en: Last spring my wife suggested that I call in a man to look at our lawn mower.
examples.zh: 去年春天，我妻子建议我请个人来看看我们的割草机。

examples.en: The teacher suggested that we (should) finish the project before Friday.
examples.zh: 老师建议我们在周五之前完成这个项目。

original.en: Some really keen enthusiasts go so far as to build their own computers.
original.zh: 一些真正热衷的人甚至自己组装电脑。

imitations.en: Some pet owners go so far as to buy expensive clothes for their cats.
imitations.zh: 一些宠物主人甚至给他们的猫买昂贵的衣服。

imitations.en: Some students go so far as to stay up all night to prepare for the exam.
imitations.zh: 一些学生甚至通宵复习准备考试。

original.en: The worst thing about the do-it-yourself game is that sometimes even men live under the delusion that they can do anything.
original.zh: 自己动手最糟糕的一点是，有时候就连男人们也会误以为自己什么都能做。

imitations.en: The worst thing about travelling alone is that you have no one to share the beautiful scenery with.
imitations.zh: 独自旅行最糟糕的一点是，你没有人可以分享美丽的风景。

imitations.en: The worst thing about forgetting your phone is that you can't contact anyone when you need help.
imitations.zh: 忘带手机最糟糕的一点是，你需要帮助的时候联系不上任何人。

sentencePatterns.pattern: As far as I could see, it needed only...

original.en: As far as I could see, it needed only a minor adjustment: a turn of a screw here, a little tightening up there, a drop of oil and it would be as good as new.
original.zh: 在我看来，它只需要一点小小的调整：这里拧一下螺丝，那里紧一紧，滴点油，就会跟新的一样了。

imitations.en: As far as I could see, the cake needed only a little more cream on top to be perfect.
imitations.zh: 在我看来，这个蛋糕只需要在顶部多加一点奶油就完美了。

imitations.en: As far as I could see, the plan needed only a few small changes to be workable.
imitations.zh: 在我看来，这个计划只需要几处小改动就可行了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: When..., I told her that either...or...

original.en: When my wife nagged me to do something about it, I told her that either I would have to buy a new mower or let the grass grow.
original.zh: 当我妻子催我想想办法的时候，我告诉她要么我买个新的割草机，要么就让草继续长。

imitations.en: When my friend asked where to have dinner, I told her that either we can eat at the new restaurant nearby or order takeout.
imitations.zh: 当我朋友问去哪里吃晚饭的时候，我告诉她要么我们去附近的新餐厅吃，要么点外卖。

imitations.en: When the teacher asked about our weekend plan, I said that either we would visit the museum or go hiking.
imitations.zh: 当老师问起我们的周末计划时，我说我们要么去参观博物馆，要么去远足。
